description: Suggested provider-only modules for UrFuture. Use as scope hints; refine against IR.

modules.title: Provider auth entry
modules.purpose: Provider signup and session entry paths tied to provider onboarding (provider-signup page, redirects into provider SPA). Shared oauth/code pages only where required for provider login.

modules.title: Provider SPA shell
modules.purpose: Provider page router, dashboard menu, header chrome, client-side view switching via enum_provider_page_path. Preserve shell layout and styles from IR element tree.

modules.title: Provider enums and menus
modules.purpose: Option sets used by provider navigation and business UI: roles, application_status, provider menus, job statuses, interview/call enums.

modules.title: Provider shared UI primitives
modules.purpose: Bubble styles → Vue design tokens; shared reusables (dropdown, checkbox, loader, uploader, progress). Must run before feature screens.

modules.title: Provider jobs CRUD
modules.purpose: List, create, edit, view jobs; publish success flows.

modules.title: Provider company profile
modules.purpose: Company profile create/edit, add company, logo.

modules.title: Candidate views inside provider
modules.purpose: Read-only candidate profile surfaces opened from pool/recruiter/chat (not candidate self-service app).

modules.title: urRecruiter and candidate pool
modules.purpose: Recruiter workspace, talent pool, search, pool actions.

modules.title: Provider application actions
modules.purpose: Invite, reject, offer, interview events, auto-accept inside provider context.

modules.title: Provider messaging and calls
modules.purpose: Provider chat hub, message cards, calls, file upload in conversations.

modules.title: Provider reporting
modules.purpose: Reports screen and report filter dropdowns.

modules.title: Provider notifications
modules.purpose: Notification list and cards in provider shell.
